steps.title: Find the common factor
steps.content:
Looking at $15w^2 + 8w$, both terms contain $w$ as a factor:
  • $15w^2 = w \cdot 15w$
  • $8w = w \cdot 8$
The greatest common factor is $w$.

steps.title: Factor out and identify the answer
steps.content:
Factor $w$ from both terms:
$$15w^2 + 8w = w(15w + 8)$$
That matches choice A — A is correct.
